name: Hash Brown Quiche
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Frozen loose hash browns, shredded (thawed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Press the hash browns between paper towels to remove excess moisture.
2. Press into the bottom and up the sides of an ungreased 9-inch pie plate.
3. Drizzle with butter.
4. Bake at 425°F for 25 minutes.
5. Combine the ham, cheese, and green pepper; spoon over the crust.
6. In a small bowl, beat eggs, milk, salt, and pepper.
7. Pour over everything.
8. Reduce heat to 350°F; bake for 25 to 30 minutes or until a knife inserted comes out clean.
9. Allow to stand for 10 minutes before cutting.
